description: Feature Description - To make a contact us enquiry - https://webdriveruniversity.com/Contact-Us/contactus.html

steps.name: I navigate to the web driver university homepage
I click on the "Contact Us Form"
I switch to the new browser tab
I type a random first name
I type a random last name
I type a random email address
I type a random comment
I click on submit button
I should be presented with header text "Thank You for your Message!"

elements.name: Validation - Submit form with missing required fields

steps.name: I navigate to the web driver university homepage
I click on the "Contact Us Form"
I switch to the new browser tab
I click on submit button
I should see a validation message of all fields and invalid email

elements.name: Validation - Submit form with invalid email format

steps.name: I navigate to the web driver university homepage
I click on the "Contact Us Form"
I switch to the new browser tab
I complete the firstname, lastname and comment fields
I provide email address 'emailaddress'
I click on submit button
I should see a validation message of invalid email address

elements.name: Validation - Submit form with invalid email format

steps.name: I navigate to the web driver university homepage
I click on the "Contact Us Form"
I switch to the new browser tab
I complete the firstname, lastname and comment fields
I provide email address 'john.com'
I click on submit button
I should see a validation message of invalid email address

elements.name: Validation - Submit form with invalid email format

steps.name: I navigate to the web driver university homepage
I click on the "Contact Us Form"
I switch to the new browser tab
I complete the firstname, lastname and comment fields
I provide email address 'john@we'
I click on submit button
I should see a validation message of invalid email address

elements.name: Reset the form clears all fields

steps.name: I navigate to the web driver university homepage
I click on the "Contact Us Form"
I switch to the new browser tab
I complete all the fields with data
I click on the Reset button
Data from all the fields are cleared with field empty
I navigate to the web driver university homepage
I click on the "Contact Us Form"
I switch to the new browser tab
I leave the 'first name' field empty and complete other fields with data
I click on submit button
I should see validation error message for 'first name'
I navigate to the web driver university homepage
I click on the "Contact Us Form"
I switch to the new browser tab
I leave the 'last name' field empty and complete other fields with data
I click on submit button
I should see validation error message for 'last name'
I navigate to the web driver university homepage
I click on the "Contact Us Form"
I switch to the new browser tab
I leave the 'email address' field empty and complete other fields with data
I click on submit button
I should see validation error message for 'email address'
I navigate to the web driver university homepage
I click on the "Contact Us Form"
I switch to the new browser tab
I leave the 'comments' field empty and complete other fields with data
I click on submit button
I should see validation error message for 'comments'

name: WebDriverUniversity.com - Contact Us Page

description:
Feature Description - Registered User logs in - https://webdriveruniversity.com/Login-Portal/index.html
    As a Registered User,
    I want to login to the application
    So that I can access my account

steps.name: I navigate to the web driver university homepage
I click on the "Login Portal"
I switch to the new browser tab
I enter "valid username" in the username field
I enter "valid password" in the password field
I click the Login button
I am displayed with a "validation succeeded" message
I navigate to the web driver university homepage
I click on the "Login Portal"
I switch to the new browser tab
I enter "blank" in the username field
I enter "blank" in the password field
I click the Login button
I am displayed with a "validation failed" message
I navigate to the web driver university homepage
I click on the "Login Portal"
I switch to the new browser tab
I enter "valid username" in the username field
I enter "blank" in the password field
I click the Login button
I am displayed with a "validation failed" message
I navigate to the web driver university homepage
I click on the "Login Portal"
I switch to the new browser tab
I enter "blank" in the username field
I enter "valid password" in the password field
I click the Login button
I am displayed with a "validation failed" message
I navigate to the web driver university homepage
I click on the "Login Portal"
I switch to the new browser tab
I enter "Invalid username" in the username field
I enter "inValid password" in the password field
I click the Login button
I am displayed with a "validation failed" message

name: WebDriverUniversity.com - Login Page
